children.heading: Provision of assistance by officials
children.label: a Provision of assistance by officials
children.text: Until the transfer of an agency to the Corporation under , any official having authority over, or functions relating to, the agency on the day before , shall provide to the Corporation such assistance, including the use of personnel and assets, as the Corporation may request in preparing for the transfer and integration of the agency into the Corporation.section 9683 of this titleOctober 5, 2018

children.heading: Services and personnel
children.label: b Services and personnel
children.text: During the transition period, upon the request of the Corporation, the head of any executive agency may, on a reimbursable or non-reimbursable basis, provide services or detail personnel to assist with the transition.

children.label: A
children.text: the rates provided by this chapter for the respective offices in which they act; or

children.label: B
children.text: the rates provided for the offices held at the time of designation.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: 2 Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to require the advice and consent of the Senate to the appointment by the President to a position in the Corporation of any officer whose agency is transferred to the Corporation pursuant to this subchapter and whose duties following such transfer are germane to those performed before such transfer.

children.heading: Transfer of personnel, assets, obligations, and functions
children.label: d Transfer of personnel, assets, obligations, and functions

children.text: the personnel, assets, and obligations held by or available in connection with the agency shall be transferred to the Corporation for appropriate allocation, subject to the approval of the Director of the Office of Management and Budget and in accordance with ; andsection 1531(a)(2) of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: relating to the agency that any other official could by law exercise in relation to the agency immediately before such transfer; and

children.label: B
children.text: vested in the Corporation by this chapter or other law.
